description: Android MCP — ADB-based device, apps, UI, logcat, emulator, files, system, debug
name: io.github.us-all/android

environmentVariables.description: Path to adb binary. Default: 'adb' on PATH.
environmentVariables.name: ADB_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Android SDK root. Used to resolve adb if ADB_PATH not set.
environmentVariables.name: ANDROID_HOME

environmentVariables.description: Default device serial when multiple devices are connected.
environmentVariables.name: ANDROID_SERIAL

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated category allowlist. Default: all categories enabled.
environmentVariables.name: ANDROID_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable arbitrary shell command execution. Default disabled.
environmentVariables.name: ANDROID_MCP_ALLOW_SHELL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable write/destructive tools. Default read-only.
environmentVariables.name: ANDROID_MCP_ALLOW_WRITE
